name: AI Consumer Idea Portfolio
description: # Consumer AI Viral 50 Clean input extracted from the user-provided "Fifty Consumer AI Business Ideas With Viral Launch Potential" report. Each idea is phrased as a simulator-friendly one-line concept so `draft-idea-portfolio` can parse and score the portfo...
notes: Portfolio tested `50` ideas across `7` scenarios and `6` audience segments.
`meme-to-motion-studio` is the recommended idea with score `56`.
`Paid Offer Pressure` is the least decisive scenario; gather more evidence there.
